name: Armory Pickleball
description: Armory Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Bellingham, WA. There are 5 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, youth programming, trainers or lessons, and a pro shop or equipment store. You can’t reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.
hours: Monday–Sunday, 5am–11pm 360-526-2566 , press 2 Bellingham 525 N. State St. Bellingham, WA 98225 Hours : Monday–Sunday, 5am–11pm 360-526-2566 , press 1 Marysville 9315 State Ave Marysville, WA 98270 Hours : Monday-Sunday, 5am–11pm 360-526-2566 , press 3 Contact Us Website by Joyco Digital .
